questions.context_sentence: It takes oxygen(氧气) from the water and does not let enough sunlight in.
questions.cn: 有足够的地方给我吗?
questions.hint: 联想记忆：e + nough（读音像“拿夫”）-> 拿够了，表示“足够”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt:
选出与中文意思最恰当的英文单词/短语：
“adj. 足够的;充分的”

questions.context_sentence: Two robots cook different kinds of food;
questions.cn: 他们销售各种各样的东西。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：kind作形容词时是“善良的”，作名词时是“种类”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt:
选出与英文单词/短语最恰当的中文意思：
“kind”

questions.context_sentence: Draw a happy face on the center of the plate.
questions.cn: 这家旅馆在村子的正中心。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：cen（看作cent，分/美分）+ ter -> 把硬币放在正中间。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt:
完成句子：
Draw a happy face on the ____ of the plate. (提示: 正中间)

questions.context_sentence: It takes oxygen(氧气) from the water and does not let enough sunlight in.
questions.cn: 暮色下的花园显得十分秀丽。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sun（太阳）+ light（光）-> 阳光。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt:
选出与中文意思最恰当的英文单词/短语：
“n. 阳光;日光”

questions.context_sentence: This brings trouble for fishermen who grow mussels (贻贝).
questions.cn: 他做作业时遇到困难了。

questions.prompt:

questions.context_sentence: I think there will be a lot of robot-themed(机器人主题的) restaurants around the world in the future.

questions.context_sentence: Now more than 80% of fishermen are having problems.
